creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

it seem that the patch has been corrupted in the PR, I can only see a 
mess there. Could you please upload it somewhere or send it to me 
directly as a gzipped attachment? If you are sending PRs from the 
command line with send-pr, you can attach the patch with the -a option, 
this should work well. 

|diff -ruN scid.orig/files/patch-src_textbuf.h 
scid/files/patch-src_textbuf.h |--- scid.orig/files/patch-src_textbuf.h 
2007-01-31 08:08:29.000000000 +0100 |+++ scid/files/patch-src_textbuf.h 
1970-01-01 01:00:00.000000000 +0100 -------------------------- File to 
patch: touch files/patch-src_textbuf.h No file found--skip this patch? 
[n] File to patch: files/patch-src_textbuf.h Patching file 
files/patch-src_textbuf.h using Plan A...  Hunk #1 failed at 0.  1 out 
of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to files/patch-src_textbuf.h.rej 
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...  The text 
leading up to this was: -------------------------- |diff -ruN 
scid.orig/pkg-plist scid/pkg-plist |--- scid.orig/pkg-plist 
2003-01-30 16:07:33.000000000 +0100 |+++ scid/pkg-plist     2008-12-26 
14:47:37.000000000 +0100 -------------------------- 


thanks
